name: shipyard
description: Claude Code plugins for project tooling.

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: Guides a project's git lifecycle: start work, land it, ship it.

plugins.name: rigging
plugins.description: Authors CI pipelines: detects a repo's stack and scaffolds a safe GitHub Actions workflow.

plugins.name: stow
plugins.description: Outfits a repo's baseline files: manages .gitignore per detected stack, updatable in place without clobbering user lines.

plugins.name: ballast
plugins.description: Configures the pytest runner: renders pytest.ini from .ballast.json so tests resolve and collect correctly.

plugins.name: hull
plugins.description: Authors a secret-scanning CI workflow (gitleaks or trufflehog) for a repo.

plugins.name: bosun
plugins.description: Authors a Dependabot config (.github/dependabot.yml) to keep a repo's dependencies updated.
